mission.title: k0s: k0s should move /var/lib/k0s/kubelet to /var/lib/kubelet
mission.description: k0s should move /var/lib/k0s/kubelet to /var/lib/kubelet. Community-reported issue.

steps.title: Identify k0s troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your k0s deployment:
```bash
k0s version
k0s status
journalctl -u k0scontroller --no-pager --lines=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review k0s configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant k0s configuration:
```bash
k0s version
k0s kubectl get nodes -o wide
k0s kubectl get pods -A
```
### Before creating an issue, make sure you've checked the following:

- [X] You are running the latest released version of k0s
- [X] Make sure you've searched for existing issues, both open and closed
- [X] Make sure you've searched for PRs too, a

steps.title: Apply the fix for k0s should move /var/lib/k0s/kubelet to /var/lib/kubelet
steps.description:
It's a bug of aws-ebs-csi-driver helm chart. I've submitted a fix: https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/aws-ebs-csi-driver/pull/1276

As a workaround you can try to add the following to the values:
```
sidecars:
  nodeDriverRegistrar:
    env: 
      - name: DRIVER_REG_SOCK_PATH
        value:
```yaml
No LSB modules are available.

Distributor ID:	Ubuntu
Description:	Ubuntu 22.04 LTS
Release:	22.04
Codename:	jammy
```

steps.title: Confirm k0s should move /var/lib/k0s/kubelet to… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
journalctl -u k0scontroller --no-pager --lines=50 --since='5 minutes ago'
k0s kubectl get events -A --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
It's a bug of aws-ebs-csi-driver helm chart. I've submitted a fix: https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/aws-ebs-csi-driver/pull/1276

As a workaround you can try to add the following to the values:
```
sidecars:
  nodeDriverRegistrar:
    env: 
      - name: DRIVER_REG_SOCK_PATH
        value: /var/lib/k0s/kubelet/plugins/ebs.csi.aws.com/csi.sock
```
codeSnippets:
No LSB modules are available.

Distributor ID:	Ubuntu
Description:	Ubuntu 22.04 LTS
Release:	22.04
Codename:	jammy

sidecars:
  nodeDriverRegistrar:
    env: 
      - name: DRIVER_REG_SOCK_PATH
        value: /var/lib/k0s/kubelet/plugins/ebs.csi.aws.com/csi.sock

sidecars:
  nodeDriverRegistrar:
    env:
      - name: DRIVER_REG_SOCK_PATH
        value: /var/lib/k0s/kubelet/plugins/ebs.csi.aws.com/csi.sock

node:
  kubeletPath: /var/lib/k0s/kubelet

prerequisites.description: A running k0s cluster or a system where k0s can be installed.
